note: Aliases: ph. Inserts a Shape with PlaceholderShape nonVisual properties â€” geometry comes from the slide layout. Add returns /slide[N]/shape[M] (placeholder is a shape at the OOXML layer). effective.* keys behave as documented in pptx/shape.json.

phType.description: placeholder type. Required at Add. Set is intentionally not supported: phType binds the placeholder to a slide-layout slot for style/position inheritance, so changing it after creation would produce a half-bound shape rather than a typed placeholder. To change a placeholder's role, remove it and re-add with the new phType.

phIndex.description: placeholder index within the slide layout (PlaceholderShape/@idx). Disambiguates same-typed placeholders (e.g. two `body` placeholders).
phIndex.readback: non-negative integer; key omitted when @idx absent

effective.direction.description: resolved reading direction inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'direction' is set directly on the placeholder.

effective.size.description: resolved font size inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'size' is set directly on the placeholder.

effective.font.description: resolved font name inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'font' is set directly on the placeholder.

effective.color.description: resolved text color inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'color' is set directly on the placeholder.

effective.bold.description: resolved bold inherited from placeholderâ†’layoutâ†’masterâ†’presentation defaults. Suppressed when 'bold' is set directly on the placeholder.

isTitle.description: true when the shape is the title placeholder (phType=title or ctrTitle).

inheritedFrom.description: placeholder inheritance source â€” `layout` when the placeholder definition lives on the parent slide layout (not the slide itself).
